name: Oatstraw
summary: It is best framed as a gentle nutritive herb with limited high-signal clinical depth.
description: It is best framed as a gentle nutritive herb with limited high-signal clinical depth.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Celiac disease/gluten sensitivity unless certified gluten-free
interactions: caution if combined with strong sedatives due to intended calming use.
